global_outreach.title: SPIT Collaborates with Worcester Polytechnic Institute (WPI), USA
global_outreach.description: MoU signed between SPIT and WPI to foster cooperation in expanding educational opportunities, mentoring undergraduate and postgraduate student projects, and enabling joint supervision of postgraduate research work. The agreement includes collaborative research funding applications, student exchange programs, exchange of research personnel, and participation in academic events.
global_outreach.outcome_or_impact: Expected to enrich academic experiences, promote global exposure, and strengthen research and educational ties between the two institutions

global_outreach.title: SPIT Signs MoU with Northeastern University, USA
global_outreach.description: MoU between SPIT and Northeastern University to deepen academic cooperation. Key collaborations include creating pathways from undergraduate to graduate programs, joint educational and training programs, and student benefits including waived application fees, 5% tuition scholarship for all admitted students, and 10% merit-based scholarship for up to 20 students.
global_outreach.outcome_or_impact: Enhanced global academic opportunities, 25% additional scholarships available through Northeastern's campus and college networks, meaningful international exchange established

global_outreach.title: SPIT Collaborates with City, University of London to Enhance Academic and Research Ties
global_outreach.institution: City, St George's – University of London
global_outreach.description: MoU signed to strengthen academic and research collaboration. Partnership includes launching joint research initiatives, developing postgraduate programs, and designing interdisciplinary minor programs. Follows discussions between Principal Professor B.N. Chaudhari's visit to University of London in May 2025 and Professor Rajkumar Roy's visits to SPIT.
global_outreach.outcome_or_impact: Global academic engagement and innovation strengthened, interdisciplinary collaboration established

global_outreach.title: SPIT Collaborates with Chinese University of Hong Kong (CUHK)
global_outreach.description: SPIT initiated collaboration with CUHK Business School in education and research domains. CUHK expressed interest in offering scholarships to deserving students for postgraduate programs at CUHK Business School.
global_outreach.outcome_or_impact: Beginning of promising partnership with opportunities for mutual growth

global_outreach.title: Online Meeting with North Eastern University
global_outreach.description: Online meeting to share insights on academic collaboration, research opportunities, and innovative practices in higher education, fostering avenues for future partnership and student development
global_outreach.outcome_or_impact: Future partnership pathways established, enhanced understanding of research collaboration opportunities

global_outreach.title: Meeting with City University, London
global_outreach.description: Meeting focused on international collaboration, knowledge exchange, and strengthening academic ties to enhance research and innovation opportunities
global_outreach.outcome_or_impact: Strengthened academic ties, enhanced understanding of collaboration frameworks

invited_talks_guest_lectures.title: Research Funding Opportunities
invited_talks_guest_lectures.description: Session guiding faculty and students on writing effective research proposals, understanding various national and international funding agencies, and exploring startup support schemes. Insights provided clarity on building research capacity and securing external grants for innovation and entrepreneurship
invited_talks_guest_lectures.outcome_or_impact: Participants gained clarity on building research capacity and securing external grants

invited_talks_guest_lectures.title: Angel Investment and VC Funding Opportunities for Early Stage Entrepreneurs
invited_talks_guest_lectures.organizer_or_host: Department of Technology, Shivaji University, IIC
invited_talks_guest_lectures.description: Expert lecture aimed at guiding young innovators on accessing funding and investment opportunities. Talk provided deep insights into entrepreneurship, innovation, and fundraising avenues
invited_talks_guest_lectures.outcome_or_impact: Highly valuable guidance for aspiring entrepreneurs, university appreciation received

invited_talks_guest_lectures.title: Innovation and Incubation
invited_talks_guest_lectures.description: Session highlighting the significance of fostering innovation, the role of incubation centers, and opportunities for startups
invited_talks_guest_lectures.outcome_or_impact: Highly engaging and well-received by students and faculty

invited_talks_guest_lectures.title: Innovation and Incubation
invited_talks_guest_lectures.description: Session highlighting the significance of fostering innovation, the role of incubation centers, and opportunities for startups
invited_talks_guest_lectures.outcome_or_impact: Highly engaging and well-received by students and faculty

invited_talks_guest_lectures.title: Welcome Note at Agile Mumbai 2024 Conference
invited_talks_guest_lectures.description: Welcome address highlighting the importance of agility, innovation, and industry-academia collaboration in today's fast-evolving technological landscape. Set the tone for the conference bringing together professionals, academicians, and students to exchange ideas on agile practices and future-ready skills
invited_talks_guest_lectures.outcome_or_impact: Successfully set conference tone and fostered participation from diverse stakeholders

invited_talks_guest_lectures.title: Holistic Development of Students and SPIT Students' Empowerment Policy 2023
invited_talks_guest_lectures.description: Talks emphasizing academic growth, leadership, innovation, and personal development, while highlighting structured support for research, entrepreneurship, and career readiness through the SPIT Students' Empowerment Policy 2023
invited_talks_guest_lectures.outcome_or_impact: Students informed about comprehensive support structures for holistic development

invited_talks_guest_lectures.title: Outcome Based Learning and Digital Literacy & Technical Proficiency
invited_talks_guest_lectures.description: Presentations covering two key topics on outcome-based learning and digital literacy & technical proficiency, aiming to provide valuable insights to attendees
invited_talks_guest_lectures.outcome_or_impact: Faculty equipped with insights on modern learning approaches

invited_talks_guest_lectures.title: Ethics and Morality
invited_talks_guest_lectures.description: Presentation designed to provide a broad overview of ethics and morality in general

invited_talks_guest_lectures.title: Speech at SPIT Alumni Meet
invited_talks_guest_lectures.description: Welcome and celebration of achievements of former students with special tribute to the Silver Jubilee Batch of 1999. Address emphasized that alumni are the institution's brand ambassadors and called for alumni to stay connected and contribute to the college's future growth
invited_talks_guest_lectures.outcome_or_impact: Strengthened alumni-institution connection, celebrated 25 years of professional success of graduating batch

invited_talks_guest_lectures.title: Innovation and Incubation and Government Funding for Setting up Incubation Centre and Startup Support
invited_talks_guest_lectures.description: Expert guest lecture providing strategic roadmap for innovation and incubation, and securing government funding for setting up incubation centers and startup support. Offered practical guide for establishing a self-sustaining entrepreneurial ecosystem within the academic institution
invited_talks_guest_lectures.outcome_or_impact: Participants equipped with actionable framework for establishing incubation ecosystem

invited_talks_guest_lectures.title: Real-Time Vision Applications based on Machine Learning and Computer Vision
invited_talks_guest_lectures.organizer_or_host: Sapat College of Engineering, Gokhale Education Society in association with IEEE Bombay Section
invited_talks_guest_lectures.description: Talk emphasizing practical AI implementations, computer vision techniques, and their applications in real-world problem-solving
invited_talks_guest_lectures.outcome_or_impact: Students inspired with practical applications of ML and computer vision

invited_talks_guest_lectures.title: Innovation and Incubation
invited_talks_guest_lectures.description: Session guiding students on nurturing innovative ideas, entrepreneurship, and the incubation ecosystem, inspiring them to transform concepts into impactful ventures
invited_talks_guest_lectures.outcome_or_impact: Students inspired to pursue entrepreneurial ventures

faculty_development_programs.title: Fundraising Initiative for Teachers
faculty_development_programs.description: Session sharing valuable insights on mobilizing resources for academic growth. Highlighted various funding opportunities from government, industries, and institutions, while showcasing the role of SP-TBI in supporting innovative teacher-led projects. Focused on empowering teachers with practical approaches to fundraising and project development, explaining how effective networking, incubation support, and partnerships with organizations like DST and industry can open doors for innovation
faculty_development_programs.outcome_or_impact: Teachers motivated to explore new avenues for professional growth and innovation, enhanced understanding of funding mechanisms

workshops_training_programs.title: Innovation and Entrepreneurship Training and Exposure Visit - AICTE Mentor-Mentee Program
workshops_training_programs.description: Training and exposure visit including sessions on entrepreneurship culture, IPR, design thinking, startup funding, and an exposure visit to the Incubation Centre and Idea Lab
workshops_training_programs.outcome_or_impact: Participants gained practical understanding of entrepreneurship and incubation ecosystem

workshops_training_programs.title: Intellectual Property Rights (IPRs) and IP Management for Startups
workshops_training_programs.description: Online workshop emphasizing the significance of protecting innovations, different forms of IPR, and their role in entrepreneurial growth. Session guided students and startups on effective IP strategies and overcoming challenges in the innovation ecosystem
workshops_training_programs.outcome_or_impact: Participants equipped with knowledge of IP protection and management strategies

workshops_training_programs.title: Government Funding for Setting up Incubation Centre and Startup support
workshops_training_programs.description: Online training program focusing on securing government funding for setting up incubation centres and startup support mechanisms
workshops_training_programs.outcome_or_impact: Participants gained knowledge on accessing government funding for incubation initiatives

workshops_training_programs.title: Intellectual Property Rights
workshops_training_programs.description: Session highlighting the role of IPRs in innovation, research, and entrepreneurship while guiding students on protecting and utilizing their creative work
workshops_training_programs.outcome_or_impact: Students empowered to protect their creative work and innovations

workshops_training_programs.title: Class Attendance and Student Discipline Session
workshops_training_programs.description: Session addressing defaulter students on class attendance, emphasizing the importance of discipline, consistency, and responsibility in shaping future engineers. Highlighted that attendance is not just a requirement but a vital step toward personal growth, curiosity, and dependability. Encouraged students to treat this as a turning point, reset their mindset, and commit to showing up every day for their own success
workshops_training_programs.outcome_or_impact: Students motivated to improve attendance and adopt disciplined approach to studies

conferences_panels_leadership.title: Mukhyamantri Yuva Karya Prashikshan Yojana (CMYKPY) – Industry Connect Program
conferences_panels_leadership.description: Attendance and engagement in the CMYKPY Industry Connect program. Participation and engagement were acknowledged as valuable contributions toward supporting youth employment initiatives
conferences_panels_leadership.outcome_or_impact: Appreciation letter received from CMYKPY Project Lead, Government of Maharashtra; invitation to continue engagement through Maharashtra Government's official employment portal

conferences_panels_leadership.title: Agile Mumbai 2024 Conference - Panel and Leadership Role
conferences_panels_leadership.description: Active contribution to bridging academia and industry. Helped drive discussions on agile practices, AI, and the future of education, ensuring strong participation from both students and professionals. Shared vision in the panel on 'Future of Academic Institutes,' emphasizing the role of emerging technologies in education reforms
conferences_panels_leadership.outcome_or_impact: Successfully bridged academia-industry gap, fostered collaboration and innovation discussions

conferences_panels_leadership.title: IEEE IATMSI-2025 Conference - Chair of Publicity and Promotions Committee
conferences_panels_leadership.role: Chair of Publicity and Promotions Committee
conferences_panels_leadership.description: Serving as Chair of the Publicity and Promotions Committee responsible for managing the event's global outreach and promotional strategies to attract a wide audience of researchers, academics, and industry professionals
conferences_panels_leadership.outcome_or_impact: Enhanced conference visibility and reach through comprehensive promotional strategies

conferences_panels_leadership.title: Cybersecurity Conclave 2024
conferences_panels_leadership.description: One-day event featuring expert talks and panel discussions on key security topics, including industry standards, AI, and legal frameworks
conferences_panels_leadership.outcome_or_impact: Knowledge dissemination on emerging cybersecurity trends

conferences_panels_leadership.title: APEX SYMPOSIUM - National Innovation and Startup Policy Council (NISP)
conferences_panels_leadership.organizer_or_host: National Innovation and Startup Policy Council (NISP)
conferences_panels_leadership.description: Two-day event organized by convenor committee from SPIT and its incubator (SP-TBI). Agenda focused on fostering a robust ecosystem for innovation and entrepreneurship through discussions on national startup policies
conferences_panels_leadership.outcome_or_impact: Comprehensive platform for innovation and startup ecosystem development
